reportedIssue: Mobile remains on Choose a flock after selecting a level.
rootCause: A later, more-specific mobile display:flex rule overrode the level map hidden state.
fix: Added html.mobile-gameplay-lock .level-map-overlay[hidden] { display: none; } after the mobile containment rule.
remainingRequiredAction: Run hosted mobile Chromium/WebKit tests, Android lint and AAB build, then verify level selection on physical Android Chrome, installed PWA, and Play wrapper.
